skills.name: content-driven-development
skills.description: Master orchestrator for AEM development — builds code against real content with author-friendly content models

skills.name: building-blocks
skills.description: Implementation guide for AEM blocks — handles block development, core functionality, scripts, and styles

skills.name: content-modeling
skills.description: Design content models and table structures for AEM blocks that are easy for authors to work with

skills.name: analyze-and-plan
skills.description: Analyze development requirements and define acceptance criteria before coding AEM blocks

skills.name: block-collection-and-party
skills.description: Search Adobe's official Block Collection and the community Block Party for reference implementations

skills.name: docs-search
skills.description: Search aem.live documentation and blog posts for AEM features, implementation guidance, and best practices

skills.name: authoring-analysis
skills.description: Analyze content sequences and determine authoring approach — default content vs. specific blocks

skills.name: block-inventory
skills.description: Survey and catalog available blocks from local project and Block Collection with purposes

skills.name: find-test-content
skills.description: Search for published pages containing a specific block to locate test content during development

skills.name: page-import
skills.description: Orchestrator for importing/migrating webpages into structured AEM HTML

skills.name: scrape-webpage
skills.description: Scrape a webpage to extract content, metadata, and images for AEM import pipeline

skills.name: identify-page-structure
skills.description: Analyze scraped webpage to identify section boundaries and content sequences for import

skills.name: page-decomposition
skills.description: Analyze content sequences within a section, identifying breaking points between default content and blocks

skills.name: generate-import-html
skills.description: Generate structured HTML from authoring analysis — creates sections, block tables, metadata, and images

skills.name: preview-import
skills.description: Open and verify imported content in the local AEM dev server, comparing with the original page

skills.name: testing-blocks
skills.description: Guide testing of AEM code changes — unit testing, browser testing with Playwright, and linting

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Review AEM code for quality, performance, accessibility, and best practices — self-review or PR review

skills.name: aem-cli
skills.description: Shell command for AEM — list, get, put, preview, publish, and upload pages via OAuth-authenticated API calls

skills.name: bluebubbles
skills.description: Send and receive iMessages via BlueBubbles REST API

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create, improve, and measure SLICC skills with guided workflows and evals
